notes: Shows as "Running" in steam library but does not launch.
title: Subsistence

notes: The game runs out of the box without any tweaks, but there is a problem with the grass/foliage. It goes up and down for the entire map. I think its the wind effect over the grass or something like that. I've tried using "disable Esync", "D3d11" use "Wine D3d11" and nothing fix this problem.
title: Subsistence

notes: Well, the problem with foliage/grass it's fixed with proton 4.11.1. Now the game runs great, it's totally playable but with low fps. i've tried to add PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% in steam launch parameters and the game runs so smooth , but it crashed without any error message all the time for me.
title: Subsistence

notes: I played it first on 4.11-2 smoothly then had problems starting the game on 4.11-3 and 4 but on 4.11-5 everything runs fine, as it was running on windows. Only glitch i encountered was a texture bug, where the rendering is white and can be seen from afar, but i don't think it is because of proton. Multiplayer was not testet, only single
title: Subsistence
